text.title: structured-output-mode-picker Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for structured-output-mode-picker. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Pick mode by output consumer: deterministic extraction → SO strict; agent action → tool call; custom DSL or local-model output → grammar; everything else legacy → json mode (only if strict SO unsupported).
rule.rationale: BuildMVPFast 2026 production guide and Vellum's mode comparison both show silent correctness regressions when json-mode is used for typed extraction; XGrammar paper shows 100x speedups vs alternatives on local DSL workloads.
